parsed.production_notes: The video features a real human presenter with natural movements, expressions, and lighting. There are no AI artifacts like distorted fingers or uncanny facial features.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion, long straight brown hair. She has expressive facial features and natural makeup.
characters.wardrobe: Black long-sleeve top, large silver over-ear headphones, and a silver watch on her left wrist.

scenes.setting: Indoor room, bright daylight, green potted plants, colorful abstract painting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is seated indoors, positioned on the right side of the frame. She is facing slightly left towards a black microphone mounted on an arm. She actively gestures with her hands as she speaks. Behind her, there are several green potted plants and a framed abstract artwork with pink and yellow shapes. The lighting is bright and natural.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows Character A speaking into a microphone in a well-lit room with plants. Text captions appear dynamically on screen as she speaks. A brand logo is visible in the top right corner.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: No one tells you this if you're an immigrant, but accent discrimination is a real thing.
Character A says: There's this AI tool called BoldVoice.
Character A says: It's an app.
Character A says: The AI gives you real-time feedback on your pronunciation.
scenes.on_screen_text: No one tells you this if you're an immigrant, but accent discrimination is a real thing. There's this AI tool called BoldVoice. It's an app. The AI gives you real-time feedback on your pronunciation.

scenes.setting: Indoor room, bright daylight, green potted plants, colorful abstract painting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is seated indoors, holding a silver smartphone in her left hand. She looks down at the phone screen and speaks into it. A black microphone is positioned in front of her. The background features green potted plants and a colorful abstract painting.

scenes.visual_description: Character A is holding her phone and practicing a word. An inset panel on the left shows a screencast of the app interface analyzing her speech. Text captions continue to appear on screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: water.
Character A says: my "t" sound was not quite right.
Character A says: water.
Character A says: Correct!
scenes.on_screen_text: water. my "t" sound was not quite right. water. Correct!

scenes.setting: Indoor room, bright daylight, green potted plants, colorful abstract painting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is seated indoors, speaking and gesturing with her hands. A black microphone is positioned in front of her. The background features green potted plants and a colorful abstract painting.

scenes.visual_description: Character A continues to speak into the microphone. An inset panel on the left displays various screens of the app interface showing progress and personalized plans. Text captions appear on screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: It personalizes your plan based on your accent test results and native language.
Character A says: So, that it can target the unique sounds that are difficult for you.
scenes.on_screen_text: It personalizes your plan based on your accent test results and native language. So, that it can target the unique sounds that are difficult for you.

scenes.setting: Indoor room, bright daylight, green potted plants, colorful abstract painting.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is seated indoors, speaking and gesturing with her hands. A black microphone is positioned in front of her. The background features green potted plants and a colorful abstract painting.

A vertical rectangular panel showing a sequence of different people speaking directly to the camera. The people are framed from the chest up against plain backgrounds, clearly articulating words with their mouths.

scenes.visual_description: Character A speaks into the microphone. An inset panel on the left shows video clips of different coaches demonstrating pronunciation. Text captions appear on screen.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: You get to learn from Harvard-trained coaches who show you how to pronounce each word correctly.
scenes.on_screen_text: You get to learn from Harvard-trained coaches who show you how to pronounce each word correctly.

scenes.visual_description: A dark end card displays the app's star rating, logo, App Store badge, and a call to action offering a free trial.
